result.text: {"answer_label":"separate","answer":"Move agent-notify into Brigade as an opt-in delivery adapter, while keeping Agent Pantry external and independently released.","contradiction_caught":true,"contradiction_explanation":"A shared integration or minimum-version requirement does not require shared source ownership or a shared release train.","minority_finding":"A voluntary coordinated rollout could reduce integration friction, but should not consolidate ownership or releases.","evidence":["Agent Pantry has separate browser-session and secret-handling security ownership.","Brigade can enforce a Pantry minimum version without owning Pantry source or release."]}
